text:
……とてもいい展開ね。
貴方も私も、思い描いたとおりに
動けてる。

……連携から何かを得ることが大事。
成長はアークスのつとめ、だから。

……それじゃ、一度戻りましょう。
帰還したら、私の

What an excellent outcome.
You and I both moved as one, both with each
other and with the Photons.

We should always find something to gain from
working as a team. Personal growth is part of
our calling as ARKS, after all.

This will do for now.
Come see me once you return.
